entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: Environmental changes that alter pest-disease dynamics and increase abiotic stresses

entities.name: PEST-DISEASE DYNAMICS
entities.description: The interaction and prevalence of pests and diseases affecting crops

entities.name: ABIOTIC STRESSES
entities.description: Non-living environmental factors that threaten agricultural production

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL PRODUCTION SYSTEMS
entities.description: Systems used for producing crops, particularly resource-constrained ones

entities.name: GENOMICS-ASSISTED BREEDING
entities.description: Breeding approaches that use genomic information to enhance efficiency and variety quality

entities.name: DNA SEQUENCING
entities.description: The process of determining the precise order of nucleotides within a DNA molecule

entities.name: GERMPLASM SEQUENCING
entities.description: Large-scale sequencing projects of genetic resources to mine haplotypes

entities.name: HAPLOTYPES
entities.description: Sets of DNA variations that together are inherited from a single parent

entities.name: COMPLEX TRAIT
entities.description: Phenotypic characteristics controlled by multiple genes

entities.name: COMPLEX TRAIT DISSECTION
entities.description: The process of analyzing the genetic basis of complex traits

entities.name: HAPLOTYPE-GWAS
entities.description: Genome-wide association studies utilizing haplotype data

entities.name: HAPLOTYPE-BASED BREEDING
entities.description: Breeding strategies that focus on the deployment of superior haplotypes

entities.name: HAPLOTYPE-ASSISTED GENOMIC SELECTION
entities.description: Genomic selection methods that incorporate haplotype information

entities.name: GLOBAL FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The goal of ensuring all people have access to sufficient, safe, and nutritious food
